description: Transaction amount meets or exceeds the AUSTRAC cash threshold reporting obligation
Transaction amount falls between 90% and 100% of the LCT threshold indicating potential structuring to avoid reporting
Wire transfer counterparty is located in a FATF high-risk or AUSTRAC-designated jurisdiction
Customer or counterparty appears on OFAC SDN UNSC or Australian sanctions lists
Transaction initiated by or on behalf of a Politically Exposed Person requiring enhanced due diligence
Customer exceeds 5 transactions within a 24-hour period
